description: Based on backtested parameter optimization achieving 72.17% win rate and 957% return. Daily trend filter with 15m entries. Originally designed for Forex, adapted for crypto futures.

swing_detection.description: A swing high/low is confirmed when a candle's high/low is greater/less than the 2 candles either side. ATR threshold filters out noise.

trend_rules.bullish: 2 consecutive higher swing highs AND 2 consecutive higher swing lows on Daily timeframe
trend_rules.bearish: 2 consecutive lower swing highs AND 2 consecutive lower swing lows on Daily timeframe

conditions: Daily trend is BULLISH (higher highs + higher lows)
15m price pulls back and forms a confirmed swing low
Price closes above the swing low high — breakout confirmed
long.description: Buy the dip in an uptrend on the 15 minute chart

conditions: Daily trend is BEARISH (lower highs + lower lows)
15m price rallies and forms a confirmed swing high
Price closes below the swing high low — breakdown confirmed
short.description: Sell the rally in a downtrend on the 15 minute chart

stop_loss.long: Below the most recent 15m confirmed swing low
stop_loss.short: Above the most recent 15m confirmed swing high

take_profit.method: Next significant swing high (long) or swing low (short) on 15m

risk.note: Original backtest was spot (no leverage). 3x leverage increases drawdown risk. Max 50% drawdown was observed on spot — with 3x this could be significant. Paper trade thoroughly before going live.
risk.position_sizing: 1% of portfolio per trade — conservative due to leverage

description_extended: Ironclad handles ALL asset classes including stocks, commodities and forex. It uses the daily chart for trend direction so it always trades with the bigger picture. Strategy 1 (VWAP scalping) runs alongside this for crypto-only ranging conditions.

performance.adapted_for: Crypto futures + stocks + commodities on BitGet
